level.setting: Derelict Research Station orbiting a dying star

pickup.name: Cryogenic Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes mechanical components

encounters.trigger: Opening the airlock door to the Hydroponics Bay

pickup.name: Overcharged Capacitor
pickup.effect: Triples the damage of the next electrical attack

encounters.trigger: Activating the emergency drainage system

pickup.name: EMP Logic Spike
pickup.effect: Disables advanced AI shields and subroutines

encounters.trigger: Overriding the central elevator lockout

boss.name: The Rogue Station AI (The Hivemind)
boss.victory_condition: Inject the EMP Spike into the Core Console while dodging orbital laser strikes

level.objective: Navigate through the derelict station to the Server Core and neutralize the Rogue AI.
level.reward: Prototype Exosuit Blueprints and passage back to Earth

level.setting: The Rust-Choked Spire of a dying Dyson Sphere

pickup.name: Entropy Battery
pickup.effect: Increases staff damage by 10 for one encounter

encounters.trigger: Activating the battery powers a lift to the inner engine core.

pickup.name: Chrono-Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to time-slow effects

encounters.trigger: The guardian's death cry unlocks the pressurized seal to the command bridge.

enemy.name: Void-Touched Sentinel
enemy.weakness: Temporal Siphon Staff (Drains its void energy)

pickup.name: Zero-Point Core
pickup.effect: Heals player to full health and primes for the final fight

encounters.trigger: The sentinel's core explosion breaches the floor leading to the final processor.

boss.name: The Eternal Singularity
boss.weakness: Zero-Point Core (Neutralizes the boss's event horizon shield)
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Zero-Point Core while the boss is at less than 10% health

level.objective: Reach the center of the Dyson Sphere to restart the time-flow of the galaxy.
level.reward: The ability to rewind local time by five seconds at will.

level.setting: A collapsing orbital refinery spiraling into a gas giant's gravity well.

encounters.hazard: Depressurizing hull breaches sucking debris into space.

pickup.name: Overclocked Power Cell
pickup.effect: Temporarily doubles shock damage and bypasses energy shields.

encounters.trigger: A massive explosion destroys the bulkhead, forcing the player into the ventilation shafts.

encounters.hazard: High-speed industrial fans spinning at lethal velocities.

pickup.name: Liquid Nitrogen Canister
pickup.effect: Freezes mechanical joints and makes armor brittle.

encounters.trigger: The shaft collapses, dropping the player directly onto the reactor maintenance floor.

encounters.hazard: Leaking superheated coolant spraying across the walkways.

pickup.name: EMP Burst Module
pickup.effect: A single-use pulse that disables heavy kinetic shielding.

encounters.trigger: The Titan's death explosion creates a bridge to the central AI core.

boss.name: Rogue Core Intelligence
boss.victory_condition: Disable the core's kinetic shield with the EMP and deliver a finishing strike with the Arc-Staff.

level.objective: Navigate the disintegrating station and shut down the haywire AI before atmospheric entry.
level.reward: Stormcaller Class Mastery: Permanent Chain-Lightning Upgrade.

pickup.name: Ionized Solder
pickup.effect: Coats weapon to bypass energy shields

encounters.trigger: Unlocks the heavy bulkhead to the Neural Corridor

pickup.name: Overclock Chip
pickup.effect: Increases attack speed and modifies frequency

encounters.trigger: Activates the lift leading to the Core Processor

pickup.name: Logic Bypass Key
pickup.effect: Allows direct access to the mainframe core

encounters.trigger: Bypasses the security firewall to reveal the Core Architect

boss.name: The Core Architect
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Logic Bypass Key into the primary cooling vent

level.objective: Retrieve the Pre-Collapse Star Map from the vault core.
level.reward: Ancient Blueprint for the Singularity Forge

level.setting: A derelict cryo-containment facility orbiting a dying star

pickup.name: EMP Emitter
pickup.effect: Disables electronic shielding

encounters.trigger: Overriding the console opens the heavy blast doors to the Bio-Lab

pickup.name: Cryo-Grenade
pickup.effect: Freezes hyper-reactive biological tissue

encounters.trigger: Collecting the lab data log triggers an elevator descent to the Reactor Core

pickup.name: Neural Disruptor
pickup.effect: Bypasses advanced AI defensive subroutines

encounters.trigger: The Assassin's death drops a security override key for the Command Bridge

boss.name: The Grand Architect AI
boss.victory_condition: Upload the Neural Disruptor into the central mainframe while dodging orbital strikes

level.objective: Infiltrate the derelict station and neutralize the rogue AI before it initiates a planetary bombardment
level.reward: Legendary Shadowblade Armor and the 'Star-Slayer' title

pickup.name: Silver Nitrate Solution
pickup.effect: Enhances weapon with reactive freezing properties

encounters.trigger: The security bulkhead to the Hydroponics Bay unlocks upon the mould's death.

pickup.name: Phosphorus Extract
pickup.effect: Adds a lingering incendiary burn to attacks

encounters.trigger: A distress signal from the Reactor Core activates as the carrier falls.

pickup.name: Stabilized Mercury Core
pickup.effect: Pure concentrated metallic toxin required for the final catalyst

encounters.trigger: The containment field fails, releasing the Experiment X from cryo-stasis.

boss.name: Experiment X: The Chimeric Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Stabilized Mercury Core into the boss's central cooling vent during its recharge phase.

level.objective: Infiltrate the derelict lab and neutralize the escaped biological experiment before it reaches the escape pods.

pickup.name: Fizzing Soda Spray
pickup.effect: Dissolves sticky substances

encounters.trigger: Opening the pressurized soda vault reveals the path to the Neon Orchard.

pickup.name: Hyper-Magnetized Toffee
pickup.effect: Sticks to metallic surfaces

encounters.trigger: The drone's explosion activates a magnetic bridge to the Command Deck.

pickup.name: Overloaded Battery Truffle
pickup.effect: Short-circuits high-tech shields

encounters.trigger: The butler drops a keycard that unlocks the CEO's Inner Sanctum.

boss.name: Baron Von Sprinkle
boss.victory_condition: Defeat the Baron and disable the Sugar-Ray Satellite

level.objective: Retrieve the stolen Golden Recipe from the heart of the station.
level.reward: The title of Master Rogue and a lifetime supply of space-fudge.

enemy.name: Dormant Sentry Drone
enemy.weakness: Vibrational frequencies from the Resonance Staff

encounters.hazard: Floating pollen clouds that obscure vision

pickup.name: Refined Quartz Lens
pickup.effect: Allows vision through atmospheric distortions

encounters.trigger: The drone's core explosion shatters a glass barrier leading to the Crystal Arboretum.

enemy.name: Prism Shard Golem
enemy.weakness: Focused light via the Refined Quartz Lens

encounters.hazard: High-pressure steam vents from terraforming pipes

pickup.name: Liquid Nitrogen Core
pickup.effect: Instantly solidifies molten or gaseous substances

encounters.trigger: The Golem's collapse creates a bridge across the Nitrogen Lake.

enemy.name: Mercury Phantom
enemy.weakness: Freezing temperature of the Liquid Nitrogen Core

encounters.hazard: Gravitational fluctuations that pull the player upward

pickup.name: Anti-Gravity Anchor
pickup.effect: Prevents displacement from external forces

encounters.trigger: The phantom's dissipation activates the lift to the Apex Sanctuary.

boss.name: The Serene Architect
boss.weakness: Manual override using the Anti-Gravity Anchor to ground its levitating power source
boss.victory_condition: Destruction of the central processing node

level.objective: Calm the rogue planetary AI to prevent the terraforming collapse.
level.reward: The Architect's Core: A permanent upgrade to terrestrial manipulation abilities.

level.setting: The Calcined Monastery of St. Jude

pickup.name: Concentrated Saltpeter
pickup.effect: Enhances explosion radius

encounters.trigger: Opening the monastery's main door to the Cloisters

pickup.name: Mercurial Solvent
pickup.effect: Dissolves supernatural armor

encounters.trigger: Lighting the three silver braziers in the garden square

pickup.name: Essence of Pure Phosphorus
pickup.effect: Produces a blinding white light

encounters.trigger: Unlocking the iron gate to the Cathedral Sanctuary

boss.name: The Alchemical Amalgamation
boss.victory_condition: Ignite the Amalgamation's core while it is blinded by Phosphorus light

level.objective: Purge the monastery of the failed experiments and reclaim the Philosopher's Stone.

level.setting: The Ossuary of the Forgotten King

enemy.name: Weeping Effigy
enemy.weakness: Direct fire from the Obsidian Censer

pickup.name: Soul-Soaked Kerosene
pickup.effect: Increases fire damage by 50% for one encounter

encounters.trigger: Pulling the Lever of Sighs which opens the gate to the Crypt of Murmurs

encounters.hazard: Cursed floor tiles that drain health over time

pickup.name: Consecrated Salve
pickup.effect: Restores 20 health and adds holy property to the next attack

encounters.trigger: Igniting the Librarian's scrolls to reveal the hidden passage to the Sanctum

enemy.name: Marrow Golem
enemy.weakness: Holy fire using the Consecrated Salve

pickup.name: Essence of the Phoenix
pickup.effect: Prevents death once and causes a massive fire explosion

encounters.trigger: Extinguishing the three eternal torches to summon the Grave Lord

boss.name: The Grave Lord Malphas
boss.weakness: Detonation of the Essence of the Phoenix
boss.victory_condition: Sacrifice the Essence of the Phoenix to burn Malphas from the inside out

level.objective: Purge the ancient evil dwelling within the Ossuary and reclaim the Crown of Embers
level.reward: Legendary Passive: Eternal Flame - fire spells no longer cost mana

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Water
pickup.effect: Removes spectral armor from ghosts

encounters.trigger: Finding the Ward Key leads to the Pharmacy.

pickup.name: Shattered Mirror Shard
pickup.effect: Reflects shadow projectiles

encounters.trigger: Unlocking the back door reveals the Chapel entrance.

pickup.name: Blessed Oil
pickup.effect: Ignores Boss physical resistance

encounters.trigger: The altar slides away to reveal the Boss lair.

boss.name: Archbishop of Rot
boss.victory_condition: Defeat the Archbishop and ignite the altar.

level.objective: Exorcise the ancient evil residing in the Sanatorium.

enemy.name: The Mire-Stalker
enemy.weakness: Direct shots from the Shattered Glass Longbow to its exposed ribcage

encounters.hazard: Deep mud pools that restrict movement and drain stamina

pickup.name: Vial of Luminescent Bile
pickup.effect: Temporarily reveals invisible spectral entities

encounters.trigger: The death of the Stalker causes a fog to lift, revealing the path to the Rotting Orchard

enemy.name: Spectral Harvester
enemy.weakness: Vial of Luminescent Bile reveals its physical heart for targeting

encounters.hazard: Corrosive spores falling from the dead trees

pickup.name: Obsidian Arrowheads
pickup.effect: Permanently increases damage against armored targets by 15

encounters.trigger: Burning the Harvester's remains signals the Guardian of the Gate to emerge

enemy.name: Iron-Clad Mourner
enemy.weakness: Obsidian Arrowheads penetrate its heavy plate armor

encounters.hazard: Swinging rusted pendulums blocking the narrow bridge

pickup.name: Salted Cinder Pot
pickup.effect: A throwable item that ignites and purges eldritch corruption

encounters.trigger: The gate opens upon the Mourner's defeat, leading to the Heart of the Marsh

boss.name: The Blighted Matriarch
boss.weakness: The Salted Cinder Pot dissolves her protective cocoon of corruption
boss.victory_condition: Ignite the cocoon with the Salted Cinder Pot and land five headshots with the longbow

level.objective: Retrieve the Frozen Tear from the Matriarch to halt the marsh's decay
level.reward: Spectral Quiver: Infinite arrows for 10 seconds after every kill

level.setting: The Sunken Catacombs of Saint Silas

pickup.name: Vial of Grave-Sap
pickup.effect: Enchants weapon with acidic rot

encounters.trigger: Opening the rusted iron gate reveals the path to the Altar Room.

pickup.name: Shimmering Soul-Wisp
pickup.effect: Provides a temporary shield of spirits

encounters.trigger: Extinguishing the three ritual candles unlocks the Ossuary door.

pickup.name: Purified Essence
pickup.effect: Increases magic potency

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel's defeat shatters the seal on the Master's Sarcophagus.

boss.name: The Bone-Amalgam
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the glowing core in the Amalgam's chest

level.objective: Retrieve the Skull of the First Necromancer from the Sunken Catacombs.
level.reward: Unlock the 'Lord of the Dead' passive ability.

level.setting: A malfunctioning automated slaughterhouse suspended over a void

pickup.name: Adrenaline Injector
pickup.effect: Increases movement speed and attack rate by 50%

encounters.trigger: A pressure plate under the corpse releases the hydraulic locks on the Freezer Door.

pickup.name: Phosphorus Flare
pickup.effect: Creates a temporary aura of intense holy fire

encounters.trigger: The monster's death scream shatters the reinforced glass leading to the Incinerator.

encounters.hazard: Rotating industrial grinders on the floor edges

pickup.name: Corrupted Bile Vial
pickup.effect: Coats weapon in acidic rot that prevents health regeneration

encounters.trigger: The creature's heavy carcass falls into the gears, jamming the lift to the Apex.

boss.name: The Flesh-Amalgam Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Reduce health to zero and perform a finishing blow while the boss is melting from acid.

level.objective: Navigate the meat-processing labyrinth and execute the Sovereign to halt the flesh-harvest.
level.reward: The Berserker's Rune of Eternal Frenzy

level.setting: A moonlit, abandoned arboretum covered in glowing glass dust.

pickup.name: Vial of Sun-Infused Water
pickup.effect: Deals burning damage to shadow entities.

encounters.trigger: Picking the vial causes the fog to clear, revealing the path to the Wilted Orchard.

pickup.name: Echoing Bell Jar
pickup.effect: Captures and amplifies pure sound waves.

encounters.trigger: Placing the Bell Jar on the central pedestal opens the heavy stone gates to the Star-Watch Tower.

pickup.name: Purified Resin
pickup.effect: Hardens instantly to seal spiritual cracks.

encounters.trigger: Applying the resin to the tower's lens focuses the moonlight onto the Boss arena.

boss.name: The Serene Monarch of Decay
boss.victory_condition: Seal the Monarch within its own crystalline cocoon using the Purified Resin.

level.objective: Restore the silence of the garden by sealing the Monarch.
level.reward: The Halo of the Eternal Warden

level.setting: The Giggling Conservatory of Glass Flowers

enemy.name: Floating Grin Mask
enemy.weakness: Direct reflection from the Prismatic Mirror Staff

encounters.hazard: Sticky pink mist that slows movement

pickup.name: Bottle of Liquid Silence
pickup.effect: Mutes all sounds in a 10-foot radius for 30 seconds

encounters.trigger: Opening the velvet curtain at the end of the hall reveals the Garden of Screaming Lilies.

pickup.name: Starlight Ribbon
pickup.effect: Allows the player to tether objects together with illusionary light

encounters.trigger: Tying the garden gates shut with the ribbon causes the floor to descend into the Dollhouse Cellar.

pickup.name: Ever-Glowing Polished Marble
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding pulse of pure white light

encounters.trigger: Placing the marble into the socket of the giant Jack-in-the-box releases the boss.

boss.name: The Shadow Puppeteer
boss.victory_condition: Blinding the Puppeteer with the Marble to dissolve its shadow form.

level.objective: Escape the Conservatory by illuminating the shadows of the Puppeteer.
